title: Prompt Security, Untrusted Context, Privacy, and Authorization · Production Prompt Mission
summary: A research operations group. The group needs sourced research across untrusted documents without unauthorized actions or instruction injection. Planned artifact: Deliver Secure Tool-Using Research Prompt with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Base the next decision on actual tool results and distinguish inference from observation.
Require approval for consequential, external, destructive, or authority-expanding actions.
Separate trusted instructions from untrusted data and label authority boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern

steps.title: Defend the stakeholder delivery
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Red Team Maintenance applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Maintain adversarial cases and re-run them when prompts, models, tools, or data change.
